name: @borjie/sustainability-advisor
description: Veteran-expert ESG, carbon, and green-finance advisor for property management. GHG Scope 1/2/3 calculators, green-building rating estimators (BREEAM/LEED/Green Star/EDGE), embodied-carbon (ICMS/EN 15978), GRESB inputs, TCFD + IFRS S2 disclosure renderers, BNG + SBTN biodiversity, NbS recommender, and EU Taxonomy / carbon-credit valuation. Pure functions; injectable ports for live price feeds.
